case_title: ABDUL LATEEF KHAN VS. MASON SECURITY SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAN, ABDUL LATEEF AS TO DEFENDANT MASON SECURITY SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
